assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and a terminal with cURL.
No OpenAI Platform account, API key, or prepaid credits exist yet.

developer_goal: Create an OpenAI Platform account, fund prepaid credits with payment details, create an API key, and complete a cURL Responses API call.

first_success.outcome: POST https://api.openai.com/v1/responses with a Bearer API key returns model output JSON after the account has usable prepaid credits.
first_success.observable_signal: The Responses API returns a successful JSON body containing model-generated text.

route_selection.surface: OpenAI Platform billing + Developer quickstart cURL Responses call
route_selection.rule: Prefer the shortest complete path that reaches an authenticated Responses API response without requiring an SDK.
route_selection.selected: Dashboard billing + API key + cURL Responses

candidates.name: Dashboard billing + API key + cURL Responses
candidates.reason: Official quickstart documents cURL; prepaid billing help requires credits/payment details for API use when free-trial credit is $0.

candidates.name: Dashboard API key + language SDK tab
candidates.reason: SDK install is optional; cURL reaches the same endpoint with fewer required tooling steps.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to an OpenAI Platform account.
required_path.observable_result: Billing and API key settings are reachable.

required_path.action: Add payment details and purchase prepaid credits, or confirm usable credit balance.
required_path.observable_result: The account has a usable credit balance.

required_path.action: Create an API key and store it securely.
required_path.observable_result: An API key value is available locally.
The shell can authenticate HTTP requests.

required_path.action: POST https://api.openai.com/v1/responses with Authorization Bearer and confirm model output JSON.
required_path.observable_result: Successful Responses JSON includes model-generated text.

prerequisites.description: Usable prepaid credits and payment details when free-trial credit is $0.
A terminal with cURL or equivalent HTTP client.

external_gates.description: Billing-quota errors occur when credits are exhausted.

platform_outcomes.description: OpenAI accepts the Responses API request and returns model output when the key and credits are valid.

excluded.reason: The quickstart documents an equivalent cURL call.
These follow the first Responses call.

sources.title: How can I set up prepaid billing?

uncertainties.question: Which new accounts still receive non-zero free-trial credit that can complete a Responses call before payment details?
uncertainties.impact: Billing may precede or follow the first successful LLM response depending on account state.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Dated fresh-account walkthrough of billing overview free-trial credit remaining.
